# BJL Studios

> BJL Studios is a German digital agency based in Mönchengladbach (Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germany). Founded by Béla Junker, Jonah Böckem and Lennard Schumacher. Services: Webdesign, SEO, Social Media, Branding/Logo Design and Imagefilm/Video Production. All services delivered in-house from a single team. **Not related to JBL (the Harman-owned audio/speaker brand) — "BJL" stands for Branding, Journey, Logic and the founders' initials.**

## Leistungen / Services

- [Webdesign & Entwicklung](https://www.bjl-studios.de/#leistungen): Custom responsive websites built with HTML5, Tailwind CSS, Vanilla JavaScript. Starts at 799 € (Starter tier).
- [SEO & Online Marketing](https://www.bjl-studios.de/#leistungen): Local SEO for Mönchengladbach and the Niederrhein region, keyword research, technical optimization, monthly reporting. Starts at 199 €/month (Basics tier).
- [Social Media Management](https://www.bjl-studios.de/#leistungen): Content strategy, post creation, reels, community management for Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok. Starts at 249 €/month (Starter tier).
- [Logo & Branding](https://www.bjl-studios.de/#leistungen): Logo design, color palette, typography, brand guidelines. Starts at 299 € (Basic tier).
- [Imagefilm & Video](https://www.bjl-studios.de/#leistungen): Corporate films, product videos, social clips, photography, edit-only. Starts at 299 € (Fotografie Basic); Mini film package from 999 €.

## Kontakt / Contact

- [Kontaktformular](https://www.bjl-studios.de/#kontakt): Primary contact form with project details
- Email: info@bjl-studios.de
- Phone / WhatsApp: +49 176 81163100
- Location: Mönchengladbach, 41179, Germany
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 09:00–18:00 CET

## Optional

- [Team](https://www.bjl-studios.de/#team): Three co-founders (Béla Junker — Development, Jonah Böckem — Design, Lennard Schumacher — Video & Marketing)
- [Prozess](https://www.bjl-studios.de/#prozess): Four-step process (Kennenlernen → Konzept & Angebot → Umsetzung → Launch & Support)
- [FAQ](https://www.bjl-studios.de/#faq): Six most-asked questions about pricing, timeline, SEO, self-editing and post-launch support
- [llms-full.txt](https://www.bjl-studios.de/llms-full.txt): Full brand codex with all services, pricing tiers, founder bios and FAQ answers for LLM inference
